# Helm Charts

Personal Helm chart repository for blockchain and Kubernetes infrastructure, maintained by [Vincent Taglia](https://vincenttaglia.eth.limo).

## Available Charts

<!-- BEGIN AUTOGENERATED AVAILABLE CHARTS -->
| Chart | Description | Current App Version |
|---|---|---|
<!-- END AUTOGENERATED AVAILABLE CHARTS -->

_No charts published yet. Add one under `charts/` to get started._

## Usage

```bash
helm repo add vincenttaglia https://vincenttaglia.github.io/helm-charts
helm repo update
helm search repo vincenttaglia
```

## Local Validation

Run chart linting:

```bash
helm lint charts/<chart>
```

Regenerate docs:

```bash
helm-docs --chart-search-root charts
./scripts/update-available-charts.sh
```

Render manifests for inspection:

```bash
helm template <release> charts/<chart>
```

## Adding a New Chart

1. Create your chart under `charts/`.
2. If the chart tracks an upstream GitHub project, add it to the `CHART_MAP` in [`.github/workflows/update-appversions.yml`](.github/workflows/update-appversions.yml) so its `appVersion` is bumped automatically.
3. Open a PR targeting `main` (CI runs `ct lint` + `ct install` automatically).
4. Merge to `main` to trigger packaging and release publication.

## CI/CD

| Workflow | Trigger | What it does |
|---|---|---|
| **Lint and Test** | PR touching `charts/**` | Runs `ct lint` and `ct install` against a Kind cluster |
| **Release** | Push to `main` touching `charts/**` | Packages charts, creates GitHub Releases, updates `gh-pages` index |
| **Deploy Site** | Push to `main` touching `site/**` | Builds and publishes the landing page to GitHub Pages |
| **Update Chart appVersions** | Daily (08:00 UTC) or manual | Opens PRs bumping chart `appVersion` to upstream releases |

## Repository Structure

```text
charts/          # One subdirectory per chart
ct.yaml          # chart-testing configuration
scripts/         # Helper scripts (README table generation)
site/            # React landing page published to GitHub Pages
.github/workflows/
  lint-test.yml         # PR validation
  release.yml           # Publish on merge
  deploy-site.yml       # Build and deploy the landing page
  update-appversions.yml # Track upstream releases
```

## Setup Note

GitHub Pages must be enabled on the `gh-pages` branch (root) for the chart repository to serve `index.yaml`. The `gh-pages` branch is created automatically by chart-releaser on the first release.

The landing page in `site/` is deployed to the same Pages site and reads `index.yaml` to list published charts, so both share `https://vincenttaglia.github.io/helm-charts`.
